positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a forest fox and a gentle glowing lantern, rendered in a clean, high-contrast silhouette style with pop-art flair. The fox should be sitting peacefully amongst large, stylized flora that feature glowing neon accents and rich jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst). The lantern emits a warm, golden radial glow that dramatically outlines the subjects against a deep midnight blue background. Central composition, symmetrical balance, vector art quality, maximalist detail, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, realistic photo, photograph, bad anatomy, out of focus, noise, extra limbs, messy, muted colors
